cloud.title: Connect to Airbnk cloud
cloud.description: Use the Airbnk or WeHere account email that can access this lock. The mobile app may sign out when the same account is reused.

data_description.email: Use the Airbnk or WeHere account email that can access this lock. Plus-address aliases are supported.

cloud_verify.title: Enter verification code
cloud_verify.description: Enter the verification code that Airbnk emailed to {email}.

data_description.auth_code: Airbnk emails a one-time verification code to the address from the previous step.

cloud_lock.title: Choose a lock
cloud_lock.description: Select which Airbnk lock to import from the authenticated account.

data_description.selected_lock: Only supported Airbnk lock models with local BLE profiles are shown here.

manual.title: Manual bootstrap
manual.description: Enter the bootstrap values for one Airbnk lock. These raw values are used only to derive local keys and are not stored.

data_description.name: Friendly lock name shown in Home Assistant.
data_description.lock_sn: Use the Airbnk lock serial number exactly as shown in the app or your existing tooling.
data_description.new_sninfo: Paste the raw newSninfo value. It is used only during setup and is not stored afterwards.
data_description.app_key: Paste the raw appKey value. It is used only during setup and is not stored afterwards.

confirm_lock.title: Finish setup
confirm_lock.description: Configure the local Bluetooth settings for serial {serial} ({model}).

data_description.name: Friendly lock name shown in Home Assistant.
data_description.discovered_address: Choose the Bluetooth address Home Assistant discovered for this lock whenever possible.
data_description.mac_address: Only needed when discovery could not automatically match the lock.
data_description.reverse_commands: Enable this only if lock and unlock appear reversed on your hardware.
data_description.supports_remote_lock: Enable this only for models that support a distinct remote lock command.
data_description.retry_count: How many additional BLE command attempts Home Assistant should make after the first try.
data_description.command_timeout: How long Home Assistant should wait for each BLE command attempt before failing it.
data_description.connectivity_probe_interval: Optional active BLE reachability probe interval. Set to 0 to disable background probes.
data_description.unavailable_after: How long the lock may stay quiet before Home Assistant marks its state unavailable.

rediscover_bluetooth.title: Refresh Bluetooth address
rediscover_bluetooth.description: Pick a newly discovered Bluetooth address for {device_name}, or enter one manually.

data_description.discovered_address: Choose the Bluetooth address Home Assistant currently sees for this lock.
data_description.mac_address: Use this only if discovery still cannot match the lock automatically.

cloud_refresh.title: Refresh from Airbnk cloud
cloud_refresh.description: Request a fresh verification code for the Airbnk account that can access this lock.

data_description.email: Use the Airbnk or WeHere account email that can access this lock.

cloud_refresh_verify.title: Enter verification code
cloud_refresh_verify.description: Enter the verification code that Airbnk emailed to {email}.

data_description.auth_code: Airbnk emails a one-time verification code to the address from the previous step.

manual_refresh.title: Refresh from manual bootstrap
manual_refresh.description: Enter fresh bootstrap values for lock {serial}. These raw values are used only to derive local keys and are not stored.

data_description.new_sninfo: Paste the refreshed raw newSninfo value for this lock. It is not stored afterwards.
data_description.app_key: Paste the refreshed raw appKey value for this lock. It is not stored afterwards.

error.code_request_failed: Could not request a verification code from the Airbnk cloud.
error.invalid_address: Enter a valid Airbnk Bluetooth MAC address.
error.invalid_airbnk_bootstrap: The Airbnk bootstrap data could not be decrypted or did not match this lock.
error.lock_mismatch: The manual bootstrap serial number does not match the discovered Airbnk lock.
error.token_retrieval_failed: Could not authenticate with the Airbnk cloud.

abort.already_configured: This Airbnk lock is already configured.
abort.another_device: The refreshed bootstrap belongs to a different Airbnk lock.
abort.cannot_connect: The requested Airbnk operation could not be completed.
abort.invalid_airbnk_bootstrap: The Airbnk bootstrap data could not be decrypted or did not match this lock.
abort.lock_not_found: The selected Airbnk lock could not be found in the authenticated account.
abort.no_supported_locks: No supported Airbnk locks were found for this account.
abort.not_airbnk_device: The discovered Bluetooth device is not a supported Airbnk lock.

data_description.name: Friendly lock name shown in Home Assistant.
data_description.reverse_commands: Enable this only if lock and unlock appear reversed on your hardware.
data_description.supports_remote_lock: Enable this only for models that support a distinct remote lock command.
data_description.retry_count: How many additional BLE command attempts Home Assistant should make after the first try.
data_description.command_timeout: How long Home Assistant should wait for each BLE command attempt before failing it.
data_description.connectivity_probe_interval: Optional active BLE reachability probe interval. Set to 0 to disable background probes.
data_description.unavailable_after: How long the lock may stay quiet before Home Assistant marks its state unavailable.
